previousFindingsResolved.note: v1.3 of this file flagged 7 'swift_print' hits in tools/*.py files. The detector's regex matched Python print() calls in tool scripts; these were never Swift production-code issues. All 7 paths re-inspected; no Swift print() remains in production source.

knownGapsNotBlocking.note: Real BLE / Wi-Fi Aware / QR camera-scanning transport adapters are intentionally not exercised by the auto-test suite; these require physical devices and are tracked in RTM as Not Covered (FR-010..FR-014, FR-040..FR-044, NFR-003, NFR-004, TR-024).
Google Play Billing and Apple StoreKit integration tests require their respective sandbox accounts; tracked as FR-053..FR-055 Not Covered in RTM.
Visual / accessibility / inclusive-copy QA (UX-001..005) requires human review; not auto-testable.
